lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What you are doing here?

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Hello, I am a mountain guide for this historical expedition. I led the team to this summit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you be able to guide me up and down the mountain?

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: I don't see why not. I've not much to do while the historians are exploring.

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: I make many trips each day so whenever you'd like to travel, just speak to me here, at the Shayzien outpost, or south of the mountain.

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Of course. Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Mountain Guide
lines.text: Okay. Come back if you change your mind.
